title: Serving infrastructure: Triton / TorchServe / BentoML / k8s + DSA 1-D DP
focus: Dynamic batching, KServe, autoscaling, safe rollback.

items.label: Model servers: TorchServe, Triton, BentoML, Seldon
interviewQuestions: Compare TorchServe, Triton, and BentoML — when does each fit?
What is dynamic batching and why does it matter for GPU utilization?

items.label: Containerization & Kubernetes for ML
interviewQuestions: Walk through deploying a model on Kubernetes with autoscaling.
When do you reach for KServe vs custom Deployment + HPA?

items.label: Traffic routing, model rollback, A/B serving
interviewQuestions: How would you do a safe rollback when a new model regresses online metrics?

tracks.label: Production ML · Capacity planning and overload behavior

items.label: Capacity planning: QPS, concurrency, p99, model size, GPU memory, and headroom
interviewQuestions: How do you size replicas for 10k QPS with a 100ms p99 budget?
What headroom do you reserve for traffic spikes, cold starts, and model reloads?
Which metric tells you whether GPU memory, CPU preprocessing, or network feature fetch is the bottleneck?

items.label: Load shedding, backpressure, queues, and graceful degradation for inference
interviewQuestions: What requests do you drop first when inference overloads?
How do queues improve throughput but hurt tail latency?
What fallback do you serve when the model tier is unhealthy?
